title: myroxylon cumingii
intro: Myroxylon cumingii, also known as Palo Santo, is a tropical tree native to Central and South America. Its medicinal properties lie in the oils extracted from its bark and wood, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, colds, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Palo Santo oil include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties, making it effective in reducing stress, promoting relaxation, and improving respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Palo Santo typically involve steam distillation to extract the essential oil, which can be used in aromatherapy, topical applications, or as a natural insect repellent.
